[[System Sub-Commander]] '''Jared Brojtal''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer serving with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and assigned to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], specifically the [[Celanon system/Legends|Celanon system]].

He had a son who attended the [[Syndaar Military Prep School]]. When his son was killed in an [[Bombing of Syndaar Military Prep School|attack]] by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]], he used every Imperial ship at his disposal to track down the Ho'Din, including his personal command ship, the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Marduk]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Gone To Ground|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
